description: Merchandise stacked above the top shelf or exceeding safe height limits risking topple onto customers
visual_signals: boxes above top shelf line
leaning product stack
items touching ceiling or sprinkler heads

description: Floor mat edges curled, bunched, or folded creating a trip hazard in walkways
visual_signals: mat corner flipped up
wrinkled mat surface
gap between mat and floor

description: Electrical cords or cables routed across customer walkways without protective covers
visual_signals: cord lying across floor
cable crossing aisle without ramp
taped-down wire in walking path

description: Emergency exit door blocked by merchandise, carts, or display fixtures
visual_signals: boxes stacked in front of exit door
shopping carts blocking exit path
display unit obstructing emergency door

description: Wet floor area without caution signage or barriers in place
visual_signals: visible liquid on floor surface
shiny wet patch on tile
spill with no yellow sign nearby

description: Electrical outlet overloaded with multiple adapters or daisy-chained power strips
visual_signals: multiple adapters plugged into one outlet
power strip plugged into another strip
outlet cover plate warm or discolored

description: Electrical panel in stockroom blocked by pallets, boxes, or stored inventory within 36-inch clearance zone
visual_signals: boxes stacked against panel door
pallet placed in front of breaker box
panel door unable to open fully

description: Fire extinguisher missing from designated mounting location or access obstructed
visual_signals: empty extinguisher bracket on wall
extinguisher hidden behind stock
missing inspection tag

description: Ladder or step stool left unattended and accessible in customer-facing area
visual_signals: open ladder in aisle
step stool near shelving in sales floor
unattended climbing equipment

description: Damaged shelving unit with bent, cracked, or missing support brackets
visual_signals: bent metal shelf bracket
shelf visibly bowing under weight
missing support clip or pin

description: Sprinkler head clearance violated with merchandise stored within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors or touching ceiling
visual_signals: product stacked to within inches of ceiling-mounted sprinkler head
tall display fixture with items nearly touching sprinkler deflector
overstock stored above shelving obstructing sprinkler spray pattern

description: Fire door or fire shutter in poor condition with damaged tracks, missing fusible links, or held open improperly
visual_signals: fire shutter with bent or obstructed guide track
fire door wedged open with merchandise or cart
fire shutter fusible link missing or painted over

description: Maximum occupancy sign not posted or not visible at main entrance or assembly areas as required by fire code
visual_signals: main entrance doorway lacking posted occupancy limit sign
blank wall near entrance where occupancy placard should be mounted
faded or illegible occupancy sign with unreadable numbers

description: ADA accessible aisle width below 36-inch minimum due to merchandise displays, fixtures, or stock encroaching into pathway
visual_signals: merchandise display narrowing aisle so wheelchair cannot pass
floor-standing product bins reducing aisle width below three feet
clothing rack extending into accessible path blocking passage

description: Stockroom stacking height exceeding safe limits with heavy items stored on upper shelves creating crush hazard
visual_signals: heavy boxes stacked above shoulder height on stockroom shelves
unstable tower of merchandise cartons on top shelf of storage rack
large appliance boxes stored on upper rack level without restraint

description: Pallet jack or hand truck in poor condition with broken wheels, damaged handles, or leaking hydraulic fluid
visual_signals: pallet jack with cracked or missing wheel rolling unevenly
hand truck with bent frame or broken handle grip
hydraulic fluid puddle beneath parked pallet jack forks

description: Receiving door area lacking security controls allowing unauthorized access to stockroom from loading dock
visual_signals: receiving roll-up door left open with no staff present
dock door propped open with no security camera or badge reader visible
exterior loading dock accessible from public area with no fencing or gate

description: Security mirror cracked, misaligned, or missing from blind corners and high-theft areas reducing surveillance coverage
visual_signals: convex security mirror with cracked or cloudy surface
empty mounting bracket where security mirror was removed
security mirror angled incorrectly showing ceiling instead of aisle

description: Checkout counter area lacking anti-fatigue mat for standing cashiers or showing repetitive motion hazard indicators
visual_signals: cashier standing on bare concrete or tile floor without mat at register
worn-through anti-fatigue mat with holes or curled edges at checkout
register scanner positioned requiring repeated awkward twisting motion

description: Customer queuing area with damaged stanchions, sharp exposed bases, or overcrowded conditions creating crush hazard
visual_signals: retractable belt stanchion with frayed or broken belt mechanism
stanchion base with sharp edge or cracked weighted bottom in walkway
dense crowd compressed in narrow queue lane with no overflow management

description: Display case electrical hazard with exposed wiring, overloaded outlets, or damaged cords behind merchandise displays
visual_signals: bare wires visible behind illuminated display case
multiple display lights plugged into single overloaded power strip behind fixture
damaged power cord with cracked insulation running behind display unit

description: Deli, bakery, or prepared food display case with missing temperature display, dirty food contact surfaces, or broken sneeze guard
visual_signals: food display case with temperature gauge reading outside safe range or blank
visible grime or residue buildup on deli case food contact surfaces
cracked or missing sneeze guard glass above self-serve food display

description: Flammable merchandise including aerosol cans, lighter fluid, and solvents stored near ignition sources or without proper separation
visual_signals: aerosol cans displayed on shelf adjacent to electrical panel or heat source
lighter fluid and charcoal stored near furnace or water heater in stockroom
flammable product shelf lacking required separation signage or fire-rated containment

description: Emergency lighting non-functional or missing in stockroom, sales floor, or corridor areas required for egress illumination
visual_signals: emergency light unit in stockroom with no green charge indicator LED
sales floor area near exit with no visible emergency lighting fixture
emergency light battery pack visibly corroded or leaking on wall unit

description: Portable heating or cooling equipment placed unsafely including space heaters near merchandise or fans blocking egress paths
visual_signals: portable space heater placed beneath checkout counter near paper bags
industrial fan positioned in doorway partially blocking exit path
space heater sitting on stockroom floor surrounded by cardboard boxes

description: Exit sign missing, unlit, or obscured by merchandise displays or signage along egress path on sales floor
visual_signals: dark exit sign with no illumination above rear emergency door
promotional banner hanging in front of exit sign blocking visibility
corridor junction on sales floor with no directional exit sign visible

description: Smoke detector missing, covered, or visibly non-functional in sales floor, stockroom, or break room areas
visual_signals: ceiling location with empty bracket and wires where smoke detector was removed
smoke detector covered with plastic wrap or tape in stockroom
detector with blinking fault indicator light or hanging off mount

description: Floor surface damaged with cracked tiles, torn carpet, or uneven transitions creating trip hazard for customers
visual_signals: cracked floor tile with raised edge in customer walkway
carpet seam pulled apart creating lip in walking path
uneven floor transition between departments with no beveled strip

description: Loading dock area with unsecured dock plates, missing edge protection, or gap between truck and dock creating fall hazard
visual_signals: dock leveler plate left in raised position with no safety chain
open loading dock door with no barrier at edge and drop visible
gap between delivery truck bed and dock edge without bridge plate

description: Restroom lacking required ADA grab bars, accessible stall dimensions, or proper signage for accessibility
visual_signals: accessible restroom stall missing side wall grab bar
restroom door lacking ADA-compliant signage with raised lettering and braille
accessible stall too narrow for wheelchair turning with fixtures encroaching
